title: Calling for rescue
description: As soon as first aid is underway, call in professional help at the first opportunity.
steps: Use any connection you have — mobile or satellite — to reach rescuers or medics.
State clearly: where and when it happened, what happened, how many casualties, and what injuries they have.
Learn in advance how to read exact coordinates off your phone even without internet access — it speeds up the search and the rescue.
If there's no signal, send someone from the group for help, leaving whoever can keep giving first aid with the victim.
